query:
UPDATE phone_numbers pn
JOIN services s ON (
  s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND LOWER(s.planName) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pn.providerServiceCode, '_', -1)), '%')
)
SET
  pn.customerName = s.customerName,
  pn.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId,
  pn.serviceExternalId = s.externalId,
  pn.monthlyCost = s.monthlyCost,
  pn.monthlyRevenue = s.monthlyRevenue
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
UPDATE phone_numbers pn
JOIN services s ON (
  s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND LOWER(s.planName) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(pn.providerServiceCode, '_', -1)), '%')
)
SET
  pn.customerName = s.customerName,
  pn.customerExternalId = s.customerExternalId,
  pn.serviceExternalId = s.externalId,
  pn.monthlyCost = s.monthlyCost,
  pn.monthlyRevenue = s.monthlyRevenue
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus';
